properties.name: The Commons
properties.description: A vast, vaulted plaza that once served as the heart of shipboard life, now hushed and shadowed. Dust-shrouded kiosks and tiered seating circles are arranged around a dry central fountain, while high above, a dead artificial sun-strip bisects the ceiling. The walls are a patchwork of styles: elegant murals of a forgotten Earth compete with jagged, neon-painted symbols and hanging woven tapestries.
properties.shortDescription: the vast, dark expanse of the Commons

properties.name: Exit east
properties.description: Leads back to Junction C.

properties.name: The Promenade
properties.description: A wide walkway lined with the hollow shells of storefronts and workshops.
properties.destinationIntent: A commercial district with storefronts, some boarded up, some displaying strange handcrafted goods. Focus on the 'The Guild of Glass' or similar artisanal faction.

properties.name: Residential Arch
properties.description: A towering archway leads toward the dense, honeycomb-like residential stacks.
properties.destinationIntent: The living quarters. Cramped but highly personalized modular housing. Evidence of high-density living and vertical gardens.

properties.name: The Weaver Statue
properties.description: A fountain statue carved from a translucent, bone-like resin. It depicts a figure with four arms weaving what looks like a DNA helix out of copper wire, though the wire has been stripped away in several places by scavengers.
properties.takeRefusal: The statue is fused to the fountain base, a monument to a philosophy of biological design.

properties.name: Dormant Festival Cart
properties.description: A brightly painted wooden cart, draped in grey dust cloths. It smells faintly of dried spices and ozone. A hand-painted sign on the side reads 'Zola's Synthetics: Flavors of the Old World'.

properties.name: The Commons
properties.description: A vast, vaulted plaza that served as the ship's social heart. Grand tiered balconies overlook a floor strewn with dust-covered kiosks and circular benches, while the ceiling—once a shimmering sky-simulation—is now a dark, starlit void of dead pixels. Faded banners of competing guilds hang limply from the railings, their once-vibrant heraldry now gray with age.

properties.name: Exit east
properties.description: Leads back to Junction C.

properties.name: High Street
properties.description: A wide, shop-lined boulevard that disappears into the gloom.
properties.destinationIntent: A commercial district with storefronts representing different eras and odd ship-specific industries.

properties.name: The Sunken Garden
properties.description: A flight of stairs leads down into a darkened pit where the smell of damp earth persists.
properties.destinationIntent: A multi-level indoor park that has gone feral, featuring bioluminescent fungi and strange adapted flora.

properties.name: Information Kiosk
properties.description: A waist-high pedestal carved from a single block of synthetic marble. Its screen is dark, but a handwritten sign taped to the side reads: 'The Festival of Third Contact is postponed until the air scrubbers are fixed.'
properties.takeRefusal: The kiosk is bolted firmly into the deck plating.

properties.name: Dormant Sweeper Bot
properties.description: A low, disc-shaped machine resting in a thick pile of its own uncollected dust. A small knitted hat has been placed atop its sensor dome, a whimsical touch from a long-gone owner.

properties.name: The Commons
properties.description: A vast, vaulted plaza that once served as the ship's heart. The ceiling is lost in shadow, but the floor is a patchwork of mismatched tiles and faded carpets, each section reflecting a different neighborhood's aesthetic. Dozens of kiosks and modular dwellings stand like silent sentinels, most draped in grey dust cloths that stir in a phantom breeze.

properties.name: East toward Junction C
properties.description: A wide passage leading toward the bow. The guide strips here split into multiple colors. A sign reads THE COMMONS but the lights beyond are dark.

properties.name: Exit east
properties.description: Leads back to Junction C.

properties.name: The Promenade
properties.description: A wide, glass-walled walkway that overlooks the lower tiers of the Commons.
properties.destinationIntent: A high-end shopping and social district with more refined, artistic architecture and possibly defunct automated storefronts.

properties.name: The Warrens
properties.description: The open plaza gives way to a dense thicket of repurposed shipping containers and stacked living pods.
properties.destinationIntent: A high-density residential area, messy and crowded with evidence of a DIY aesthetic and jury-rigged power lines.

properties.name: The Silent Weeper
properties.description: A fountain statue carved from a single block of recycled polymer. It depicts a figure holding a leaking jug, but instead of water, a slow-moving, bioluminescent algae drips from the vessel, casting a faint green glow on the surrounding dry basin.
properties.takeRefusal: The statue is bolted to the deck plates and weighs more than a hibernation pod.

properties.name: Fragmented Bulletin Board
properties.description: A cork-like surface covered in layers of physical paper, digital sticky notes, and hand-painted signs. Most are sun-bleached or corrupted, but a few fragments remain legible.
properties.takeRefusal: It's a heavy slab of communal history; you can't just walk off with it.

properties.name: The Commons
properties.description: A vast, vaulted plaza that once served as the ship's heart. The ceiling is lost in shadow, but the floor is a patchwork of mismatched tiles and faded carpets, each section reflecting a different neighborhood's aesthetic. Dozens of kiosks and modular dwellings stand like silent sentinels, most draped in grey dust cloths that stir in a phantom breeze.

scenery.description: This particular unit appears to have been a dispensary for 'Memory-Silk,' featuring a glass counter etched with the faded logo of a blooming lotus. Inside the display, a robotic mannequin with three slender arms remains frozen in the middle of a delicate weaving gesture.
scenery.rejection: The kiosk is hermetically sealed behind a layer of reinforced polymer, and the vendor-bot ignores your rhythmic tapping on the glass.

properties.name: The Commons
properties.description: A vast, vaulted plaza that once served as the ship's heart. The ceiling is lost in shadow, but the floor is a patchwork of mismatched tiles and faded carpets, each section reflecting a different neighborhood's aesthetic. Dozens of kiosks and modular dwellings stand like silent sentinels, most draped in grey dust cloths that stir in a phantom breeze.

scenery.description: This particular unit appears to have been a dispensary for 'Memory-Silk,' featuring a glass counter etched with the faded logo of a blooming lotus. Inside the display, a robotic mannequin with three slender arms remains frozen in the middle of a delicate weaving gesture.
scenery.rejection: The kiosk is hermetically sealed behind a layer of reinforced polymer, and the vendor-bot ignores your rhythmic tapping on the glass.

properties.name: Hibernation Bay C-7
properties.description: A small chamber with four hibernation pods arranged in a square. Two are sealed and frosted over, their occupants dimly visible through the glass. One stands empty, its lid raised, interior dry. The fourth — yours — is open and still trailing cold vapor. Emergency strip lighting casts everything in pale amber. A status panel on the wall blinks. The air smells faintly of antiseptic.
properties.aiPrompt: This is the starting room. The goal is to introduce the player gently — a small, contained space that orients them before they step into the larger ship. Keep it simple: the pod they woke from, a couple of sealed pods with sleeping people (context, not interactive), and the status panel. Don't add too much here — the interesting stuff is out in the ship.

scenery.description: Your hibernation pod is a sleek, form-fitting shell of composite polymer, still radiating a deep, lung-chilling frost. The interior padding bears the lingering impression of your body, surrounded by a tangle of disconnected bio-monitoring leads that look like severed white vines.
scenery.rejection: The pod has fulfilled its purpose; there is no reason to climb back into that freezing coffin.

properties.name: Hibernation Bay C-7
properties.description: A small chamber with four hibernation pods arranged in a square. Two are sealed and frosted over, their occupants dimly visible through the glass. One stands empty, its lid raised, interior dry. The fourth — yours — is open and still trailing cold vapor. Emergency strip lighting casts everything in pale amber. A status panel on the wall blinks. The air smells faintly of antiseptic.
properties.aiPrompt: This is the starting room. The goal is to introduce the player gently — a small, contained space that orients them before they step into the larger ship. Keep it simple: the pod they woke from, a couple of sealed pods with sleeping people (context, not interactive), and the status panel. Don't add too much here — the interesting stuff is out in the ship.

scenery.description: Your hibernation pod is a sleek, form-fitting shell of composite polymer, still radiating a deep, lung-chilling frost. The interior padding bears the lingering impression of your body, surrounded by a tangle of disconnected bio-monitoring leads that look like severed white vines.
scenery.rejection: The pod has fulfilled its purpose; there is no reason to climb back into that freezing coffin.

scenery.description: Four sleek, casket-like units occupy the center of the bay, their white composite shells showing faint discolorations where hands have brushed against them for centuries. The two sealed units hum with a low, rhythmic vibration, while your own smells of ozone and the lingering chill of liquid nitrogen.
scenery.rejection: The magnetic seals on the occupied units are locked tight by a ship-wide protocol you don't yet understand.

properties.name: Hibernation Bay C-7
properties.description: A small chamber with four hibernation pods arranged in a square. Two are sealed and frosted over, their occupants dimly visible through the glass. One stands empty, its lid raised, interior dry. The fourth — yours — is open and still trailing cold vapor. Emergency strip lighting casts everything in pale amber. A status panel on the wall blinks. The air smells faintly of antiseptic.
properties.aiPrompt: This is the starting room. The goal is to introduce the player gently — a small, contained space that orients them before they step into the larger ship. Keep it simple: the pod they woke from, a couple of sealed pods with sleeping people (context, not interactive), and the status panel. Don't add too much here — the interesting stuff is out in the ship.

scenery.description: Your hibernation pod is a sleek, form-fitting shell of composite polymer, still radiating a deep, lung-chilling frost. The interior padding bears the lingering impression of your body, surrounded by a tangle of disconnected bio-monitoring leads that look like severed white vines.
scenery.rejection: The pod has fulfilled its purpose; there is no reason to climb back into that freezing coffin.

scenery.description: Four sleek, casket-like units occupy the center of the bay, their white composite shells showing faint discolorations where hands have brushed against them for centuries. The two sealed units hum with a low, rhythmic vibration, while your own smells of ozone and the lingering chill of liquid nitrogen.
scenery.rejection: The magnetic seals on the occupied units are locked tight by a ship-wide protocol you don't yet understand.

properties.name: hibernation pods
properties.description: Four pods are arranged here. Two remain sealed with a thick layer of frost obscuring the occupants, while the other two stand open—one being the unit you just vacated, still smelling of medicinal preservatives.
properties.takeRefusal: The pods are heavy-duty medical installations, bolted deep into the deck plating and connected to the ship's life support veins.

properties.name: Corridor C
properties.description: A broad corridor with gently curved walls of brushed metal. Colored guide strips run along the floor — green toward the bow, red toward the stern. Recessed lighting panels overhead flicker intermittently, some dead entirely. A faded mural on one wall depicts people planting trees under a stylized sun. Below it, someone has scratched smaller figures in a different style.
properties.aiPrompt: The first step into the wider ship. The player should start noticing that this place has layers — the mural and the scratched figures hint that different people lived here at different times. This corridor connects the safe starting area to the rest of the deck. Objects here should be transitional: signage, wall markings, small hints of the ship's history.

scenery.description: The mural's original layer is a masterpiece of geometric precision, showing people in matching jumpsuits tending to a lush, green world. Overlapping the bottom edge, a series of frantic, charcoal-like scratches depict stick figures dancing around a fire that looks suspiciously like a malfunctioning engine core.
scenery.rejection: The pigment is baked directly into the bulkhead's polymer coating; you couldn't scrub it off even if you had the heart to try.

properties.name: Pulsing Pith-Fruit
properties.description: A translucent, pear-shaped fruit that seems to beat with a slow, rhythmic internal light. Its skin is patterned with bioluminescent veins that suggest a nervous system more than a nutrient network.

properties.name: Synthetic Apple
properties.description: A perfectly spherical fruit with a skin that shimmers like brushed copper. It smells faintly of ozone and cinnamon, a product of the ship's ancient nutrient synthesizers.

properties.name: The Drowned Orchard
properties.description: The grow-lights here have failed, leaving the chamber in a perpetual emerald twilight cast by bioluminescent moss. Stunted trees with silver-veined leaves emerge from a shallow, flooded floor where water has pooled into a mirror-still black lake. A half-submerged stone bench, carved with intricate floral patterns, sits near a cluster of musical reeds that whistle softly in the ventilation draft.
properties.secret: The stone bench is actually a lid for a dry-storage compartment used by the Weavers for seeds. If a player 'hums' or 'sings' at the musical reeds in a specific pitch, they resonate and cause the bench's mechanism to click open.
scenery: The smell of damp earth and sweet decay hangs heavy in the humid air.
Ripples occasionally disturb the water's surface, though nothing is visible beneath.
The ceiling is a mass of dead cables and hanging vines that look like frozen lightning.

properties.name: The Tangle Pathway
properties.description: The vegetation thickens to the north, where the grow-troughs have been completely overtaken. A narrow path winds between the trunks of plants that have no business being this large.

properties.name: Exit south
properties.description: Leads back to Hydroponics Gallery.

properties.name: The Weeping Arch
properties.description: A heavy door framed by weeping willow-like vines that pulse with a faint, rhythmic violet light.
properties.destinationIntent: A research laboratory or sanctuary belonging to the Verdant Weavers, focused on genetic modification of seeds.

properties.name: The Sump Grate
properties.description: Beneath the shallow water, a rusted iron grate has been pried open, leading into the dark plumbing neck of the ship.
properties.destinationIntent: A dark, cramped maintenance crawlspace filled with old pipes and the sound of rushing water.

properties.name: Musical Reeds
properties.description: These translucent, hollow stalks grow in a neat cluster from the water. They are perforated with natural holes that create a haunting, multi-tonal chord whenever the air moves through them.
properties.takeRefusal: The reeds are firmly rooted in the underwater silt; pulling them would destroy their delicate acoustics.

properties.name: Sodden Leather Satchel
properties.description: A bag made of thick, treated plant-leather hangs from a dead branch just above the water line. It is embossed with a stylized leaf and a series of tally marks.

properties.name: The Seed-Singer's Sanctuary
properties.description: The air here is thick with the scent of ozone and damp earth, vibrating with a constant low-frequency hum. Rows of glass canisters line the walls, each containing a single seed suspended in a shimmering, nutrient-rich suspension. At the center of the room, a massive loom-like apparatus of polished bone and fiber-optic thread is frozen mid-motion, draped in unfinished tapestries of living moss.
properties.secret: The loom in the center of the room can be 'played' like a harp if the player has the correct resonance. Successfully interacting with the liquid mercury pedestal reveals that the seeds are not just for food, but carry encoded cultural memories.

properties.name: The Weeping Archwayvines
properties.description: A heavy door framed by weeping willow-like vines that pulse with a faint, rhythmic violet light.

properties.name: Exit southeast
properties.description: Leads back to The Drowned Orchard.

properties.name: The Spore-Lock
properties.description: A heavy door of reinforced resin, sealed with a bio-metric panel shaped like a handprint.
properties.destinationIntent: A pressurized clean-room for fungal spore sorting and distribution.

properties.name: The Sky-Root Ladder
properties.description: A vertical shaft where thick, braided vines serve as rungs, disappearing into a bright overhead glow.
properties.destinationIntent: An observation deck overlooking the canopy of the ship's main arboretum.

properties.name: Resonance Tuning Fork
properties.description: A three-pronged fork made of a material that looks like calcified coral. When struck, it doesn't just make a sound; it causes nearby plant life to visibly lean toward it.
properties.secret: Striking this fork near the 'Musical Reeds' in the adjacent room or the 'Loom' here will trigger a harmonic sequence that unlocks hidden storage compartments.

properties.name: Pulsing Pedestal
properties.description: A pedestal grown from dark, knotted wood with a surface of liquid mercury that ripples when you approach.
properties.takeRefusal: The pedestal is rooted deep into the ship's deck, drawing power from the underlying mycelial network.

properties.name: The Canopy Overlook
properties.description: You emerge onto a platform of woven silver cables and transparent polymers, suspended high above a sea of bioluminescent foliage. Below, the arboretum stretches for kilometers in a riot of emerald, violet, and neon blue, while the massive structural ribs of The Aaru arch overhead like the skeleton of a prehistoric beast. A brass-rimmed telescope on a tripod points toward a particularly dense thicket of singing-willows.
scenery: The distant hum of the ship's environmental scrubbers
Tiny winged maintenance drones darting between giant leaves below
The smell of blooming jasmine and recycled ozone
properties.secret: If the player uses the Resonance Tuning Fork while looking through the telescope, the green liquid lens will vibrate, revealing hidden thermal signatures of hibernating crew pods nestled deep within the tree canopy below.

properties.name: The Sky-Root Ladder (Downwards)
properties.description: A vertical shaft where thick, braided vines serve as rungs, disappearing into a bright overhead glow.

properties.name: Exit down
properties.description: Leads back to The Seed-Singer's Sanctuary.

properties.name: The High-Line Tram
properties.description: A single, rusted rail leads away from the platform into a dark tunnel carved through the ship's bulkhead.
properties.destinationIntent: A transit hub for the upper decks, possibly abandoned or repurposed.

properties.name: The Hanging Garden Walkway
properties.description: A narrow bridge made of interconnected planter boxes and vines that sways gently in the artificial breeze.
properties.destinationIntent: A vertical farming district where people once lived among their crops.

properties.name: The Veridian Eye
properties.description: A heavy telescope constructed from polished brass and what looks like a giant, dried insect's thorax. Its lens isn't glass, but a perfectly still pool of dark green liquid.
properties.takeRefusal: The telescope is bolted to the silver cables of the deck; it's meant for seeing, not carrying.

properties.name: Surveyor's Log-Plate
properties.description: A thin sheet of etched copper, tarnished at the edges, resting on the deck railing.
properties.dataContent: Cycle 440,211: The spore-drifts are thickening in the lower orchard. The Seed-Singers claim it's a 'harmonic divergence,' but the sensors show a simple carbon spike. If we don't vent Sector 7 soon, the moss will reach the Sky-Root Ladder by winter.

properties.name: Engineering Access C
properties.description: A cramped, vertical corridor dominated by heavy-duty conduits and vibrating deck plates. Yellow industrial lighting flickers overhead, casting long shadows across a series of reinforced bulkheads and pressure-sealed lockers. The air is thick with the smell of ozone and old lubricant, punctuated by the rhythmic, deep-bass thrum of the ship's massive life-support pumps.
properties.aiPrompt: This is a high-utility maintenance area. The atmosphere should be industrial and slightly claustrophobic. Machinery noise makes quiet conversation difficult. The technology here is the ship's original hardware, layered with centuries of ad-hoc repairs.
scenery: exposed bundles of fiber-optic cables
stenciled yellow floor markings
vibrating metal gratings
dull grey bulkhead walls
properties.secret: Tracing the yellow floor markings reveals they don't just mark safety zones; they form a complex navigational cipher used by the 'Engine-Seers' to navigate the ship when the main lights failed centuries ago.

properties.name: Heavy Engineering Hatch
properties.description: A heavy hatch in the floor with yellow-and-black hazard striping. A keypad glows beside it. The word ENGINEERING is stenciled on the rim.

properties.name: Exit north
properties.description: Leads back to Junction C.

properties.name: Maintenance Ladderway
properties.description: A steep, narrow ladder descends into a dimly lit shaft where steam occasionally hisses from leaky valves.
properties.destinationIntent: The Lower Machine Gut — a hot, noisy, and labyrinthine space where the ship's primary kinetic engines are maintained. Should feel dangerous and visceral.

properties.name: Heavy Blast Door
properties.description: A massive circular door designed to seal off the engineering wing in case of hull breach. It looks currently operational but requires a specific authorization code.
properties.destinationIntent: Main Engineering Core — a vast cathedral-like space housing the ship's primary power source. It should be awe-inspiring and technologically dense.

properties.name: Maintenance Terminal
properties.description: A ruggedized interface bolted to the wall, its screen protected by a thick layer of scratched polycarbonate. A physical keyboard with chunky, grease-stained keys sits below a series of analog diagnostic gauges.
properties.takeRefusal: The terminal is an integral part of the ship's bulkhead and is welded in place.

properties.name: Corroded Tool Locker
properties.description: A metal locker with a magnetic latch that has been partially melted. Someone has scratched a poem into the door: 'The heart beats iron, the lungs breathe spark, we sail forever through the dark.'
properties.secret: Inside the locker is a heavy-duty wrench that has been modified with a small, glowing crystal, suggesting a fusion of mechanical and biotech repair techniques.

properties.name: The Lower Machine Gut
properties.description: The air here is a thick, humid haze of vaporized coolant and grease that clings to your skin like a second layer. Colossal brass pistons groan as they drive back and forth with bone-shaking force, their rhythm punctuated by the screech of high-pressure steam venting from rusted relief valves. The narrow catwalks are slippery with oil, suspended over a dark, churning abyss where the ship's primary kinetic drives hum with terrifying power.
properties.aiPrompt: The environment is extremely loud and hazardous; NPCs should communicate via shouting or hand signals. The machinery is ancient and exhibits many non-standard modifications from different eras of Aaru history.
scenery: massive brass pistons
hissing steam valves
oil-slicked catwalks
a deep kinetic thrum
flickering red emergency lights
properties.secret: Pulling the governor lever while holding a conductive object bridges a gap in the ancient wiring, temporarily slowing the pistons and revealing a hidden compartment behind the shrine.

properties.name: Ascending Ladderway-C1280
properties.description: A steep, narrow ladder descends into a dimly lit shaft where steam occasionally hisses from leaky valves.

properties.name: Exit up
properties.description: Leads back to Engineering Access C.

properties.name: Piston Service Crawl
properties.description: A low, cramped tunnel that follows the reciprocating arm of a massive engine component.
properties.destinationIntent: A quieter maintenance niche used by engine-tenders, possibly containing religious offerings to the machines.

properties.name: The Sump Grating
properties.description: A heavy iron grate lead further down into the dark, liquid-filled depths of the drive housing.
properties.destinationIntent: The flooded lower sumps where scavenger bots or strange bio-sludge might exist.
properties.takeRefusal: The grate is bolted down and requires a heavy-duty tool to pry open.

properties.name: Shrine of the Constant Flow
properties.description: A cluster of brass oil-cans and colorful glass vials has been arranged on a vibrating ledge, surrounding a small, battery-powered figurine that endlessly mimics the motion of a piston. The vials contain lubricants of various hues—some iridescent blue, others a murky, organic green—left as offerings to keep the engines from seizing.
properties.takeRefusal: Disturbing the offerings feels like an invitation for the floor to collapse under you.

properties.name: weighted governor lever
properties.description: A massive, floor-mounted lever topped with a heavy sphere of lead. It vibrates so violently it's a blur to the eye, and a series of notched settings are carved into the floor plate in an alphabet you don't recognize.
properties.takeRefusal: It's bolted into the ship's primary drive assembly.

properties.name: The Votive Niche
properties.description: The thunderous roar of the pistons fades into a rhythmic, distant heartbeat within this small, alcove-like pocket. Soft light emanates from dozens of flickering, wax-covered diodes clustered around a central pressure-relief valve. The walls are lined with small, handmade offerings: braided copper wires, polished ball bearings, and tiny portraits painted on scraps of hull plating.
properties.aiPrompt: This is a quiet, quasi-religious space for engine tenders. The atmosphere is solemn and contemplative. NPCs here would likely be whispering or performing maintenance as a form of prayer.
scenery: The scent of ozone and incense hangs heavy in the still air.
A small rug made of recycled carbon-fiber rests on the floor, worn thin by kneeling.

properties.name: Piston Service Crawlway
properties.description: A low, cramped tunnel that follows the reciprocating arm of a massive engine component.

properties.name: Exit west
properties.description: Leads back to The Lower Machine Gut.

properties.name: Service Conduit B-12
properties.description: A narrow, circular pipe-way that smells of stale recycled air.
properties.destinationIntent: A cluster of crew quarters for the lower deck workers, possibly overcrowded and filled with personal artifacts.

properties.name: The Rattling Relic
properties.description: A glass jar containing a single, high-precision ceramic sphere that bounces and rattles rhythmically against the glass, powered by a small induction coil at the base. It seems to be a 'tuning fork' for the ship's vibration, kept here to monitor the health of the unseen turbines.
properties.shortDescription: a glass jar containing a vibrating ceramic sphere
properties.takeRefusal: Taking this feels like stealing the heartbeat of the room, though it isn't physically attached.

properties.name: Offerings Basin
properties.description: A wide, shallow bowl fashioned from a repurposed ventilation shroud. It is filled with a mixture of dark, viscous oil and dozens of small, discarded mechanical components like springs and washers.
properties.secret: Stirring the oil reveals a small, silver-plated data-key that was dropped as a high-value sacrifice.

properties.name: The Honeycomb Warren
properties.description: A dense cluster of sleeping pods is stacked floor-to-ceiling, partitioned by curtains of woven copper mesh and hanging laundry. The air is thick with the smell of recycled ozone and medicinal herbs, and every available surface is cluttered with personal icons, small potted mosses, and whirring trinkets. A low, communal table in the center is covered in a map of the ship's pipework, hand-annotated with charcoal.
scenery: rhythmic snoring from a distant pod
a string of drying mechanic's rags
the soft amber glow of safety lanterns
properties.secret: A loose floor plating under the communal table hides a small cache of 'illegal' flower seeds from a different sector of the ship.

properties.name: Service Conduit B-12 (Southbound/Niche Access)
properties.description: A narrow, circular pipe-way that smells of stale recycled air.

properties.name: Exit south
properties.description: Leads back to The Votive Niche.

properties.name: Ventilation Shaft 4-C
properties.description: A narrow, circular hatch leading into the ship's breathy dark.
properties.destinationIntent: A maintenance crawlspace filled with thick, bioluminescent fungal growth and ancient filtration machinery.

properties.name: The Communal Wash
properties.description: The sound of splashing water and heavy steam wafts from this low-ceilinged doorway.
properties.destinationIntent: A shared bathing area where water is recycled through a series of elaborate, musical brass tiers.

properties.name: Master Valve Tapestry
properties.description: A large wall hanging made from thousands of colored wires stripped from old consoles. It depicts a stylized, many-armed figure holding a wrench and a lotus, standing atop a massive turbine.
properties.takeRefusal: The tapestry is woven directly into the wall's structural mesh; it's part of the room now.

properties.name: smudged datapad
properties.description: A ruggedized tablet with a cracked screen, its casing heavily scarred by tool-burns. It flickers with a list of maintenance shifts and personal notes.
properties.dataContent: SHIFT LOG: Kaelen missed the 0400 lubrication ritual again. The pistons are beginning to 'sing' in the key of G-sharp. If we don't appease the flow soon, the dampeners will fail before the next cycle. Remind the kids: the steam is holy, but it still burns.

properties.name: The Musical Cisterns
properties.description: Steamy air carries a melodic, metallic chime as water cascades through a vertical forest of polished brass basins. Each tier is shaped like a different instrument's bell, vibrating with a distinct pitch as the recycled fluid tumbles into the steaming pool below. Thick, moss-covered tiles line the floor, warmed from beneath by hidden thermal conduits.
properties.secret: Adjusting the flow valves on the third tier changes the harmonic resonance of the room; certain frequencies cause the floor tiles to vibrate, revealing a loose stone near the drainage grate.
scenery: A constant, gentle mist that smells of citrus and copper.
A series of hand-hammered brass pipes that weave across the ceiling like frozen snakes.
Small, luminescent aquatic ferns clinging to the edges of the lower basins.

properties.name: The Communal Wash Entrance
properties.description: The sound of splashing water and heavy steam wafts from this low-ceilinged doorway.

properties.name: Exit west
properties.description: Leads back to The Honeycomb Warren.

properties.name: Heavy Gasket Door
properties.description: A thick, pressure-sealed door leading toward the ship's primary filtration core.
properties.destinationIntent: A high-pressure water filtration facility filled with humming centrifuges and glowing bio-filters.

properties.name: Maintenance Ladder
properties.description: A ladder of rungs welded directly into the brass piping leads up toward the steam-shrouded ceiling.
properties.destinationIntent: A narrow catwalk overlooking the wash area, used for tuning the acoustic properties of the water flow.

properties.name: harmonic scrubber
properties.description: A hand-sized sphere of porous obsidian that vibrates with a soothing hum when held. It is designed to clean the skin using ultrasonic frequencies rather than abrasive soap.
properties.takeRefusal: The scrubber is currently tethered to the basin by a fine silver chain.

properties.name: steam-etched tablet
properties.description: A brass plate bolted to the central pillar, its surface etched with swirling patterns that catch the condensation.
properties.takeRefusal: It's bolted firmly to the plumbing infrastructure.

properties.name: The Acoustic Catwalk
properties.description: Suspended high above the cisterns, this narrow metal walkway vibrates with the resonant frequencies of the falling water below. A console of sliding brass weights and tuning forks is bolted to the railing, allowing for precise adjustment of the chamber's echoing properties. The air here is thinner and cooler, smelling faintly of ozone and wet metal.
properties.secret: Adjusting the weights on the console changes the pitch of the 'music' in the cisterns below. If tuned to a perfect fifth, the vibration causes a hidden compartment in the walkway to click open.

properties.name: Maintenance Ladder Down
properties.description: A ladder of rungs welded directly into the brass piping leads up toward the steam-shrouded ceiling.

properties.name: Exit down
properties.description: Leads back to The Musical Cisterns.

properties.name: Ventilation Duct
properties.description: A circular hatch leading into a humming, dark horizontal shaft.
properties.destinationIntent: A narrow service corridor filled with the sound of giant fans.

properties.name: Tuning Slide Console
properties.description: An intricate array of sliding weights attached to long, vertical wires that stretch down into the mist. Each slide is marked with notches representing different harmonic scales.
properties.takeRefusal: The console is part of the ship's physical feedback loop; moving it would require heavy tools and a lack of musical taste.

properties.name: Tarnished Pitch Pipe
properties.description: A small, six-holed flute-like device made of a strange, translucent bone. It feels warm to the touch and hums when held near the console.
properties.secret: Blowing into the pitch pipe while touching the tuning console causes the water basins below to shift their orientation, changing the exit paths in the room below.

properties.name: The Howling Gallery
properties.description: A narrow service corridor where the wind whips through with ear-splitting intensity. Massive bronze fan blades, etched with geometric filigree, spin within the walls behind heavy mesh screens. The air pressure here fluctuates rhythmically, making your ears pop and the metal floor plates rattle.
properties.takeRefusal: The ship's structural elements are not for the taking.
scenery: The glint of polished bronze through the grates.
Dust motes dancing in the turbulent air currents.
Small tufts of blue moss clinging to the less windy corners.
properties.secret: If the player uses the Vibration-Dampening Stave on the fan mesh, the howling stops, revealing a hidden compartment behind a loose floor plate containing a small brass gear.

properties.name: narrow duct opening
properties.description: A circular hatch leading into a humming, dark horizontal shaft.

properties.name: Exit south
properties.description: Leads back to The Acoustic Catwalk.

properties.name: heavy pressure door
properties.description: A thick circular hatch with a manual crank handle, vibrating with the force of the air behind it.
properties.destinationIntent: A quiet, pressurized atrium filled with floating botanical specimens.

properties.name: Vibration-Dampening Stave
properties.description: A heavy rod made of a lead-like alloy, topped with a cluster of soft, rubbery nodules. It seems designed to be jammed into rattling machinery to silence it.
properties.takeRefusal: It's surprisingly heavy, but you manage to lift it.

properties.name: Wind-scratched Log
properties.description: A small slate mounted to the wall, its surface deeply pitted by abrasive dust carried by the fans.
properties.takeRefusal: It's welded to the fan housing.
